description: GitHub integration via PAT — create PRs, read PR state, list PRs by head branch, snapshot PR check status, list + submit PR reviews, list inline review comments. Tight tool surface focused on what dev-open-pr + dev-pr-review + dev-pr-review-publish + future dev-pull-pr-comments need.

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.summary: Push-assumed; opens a PR on GitHub. Returns { number, url, state, draft, user_login }.

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.summary: Read PR state by number. Returns the full GitHub PR object.

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.summary: List open PRs filtered by head branch (e.g. to detect 'PR already exists' for idempotent open-pr re-runs).

tools.name: list_pull_request_checks
tools.summary: Snapshot the PR's check runs + commit statuses for CI state reporting. Single read, no polling.

tools.name: list_pull_request_reviews
tools.summary: List formal reviews on a PR — top-level review events with verdict (APPROVED / CHANGES_REQUESTED / COMMENTED / DISMISSED), body, submitter, and submitted_at. Use to surface external reviewers' verdicts back into the OS.

tools.name: list_pull_request_review_comments
tools.summary: List inline file/line review comments on a PR. Returns each comment's id, review_id, in_reply_to_id (for threads), path, line, side, body, author, created_at, html_url. Optional `since` filter for incremental sync.

tools.name: create_pull_request_review
tools.summary: Submit a batched PR review with inline comments + verdict (APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES / COMMENT). Comments may carry start_line/start_side for true multi-line range anchors (forwarded only when start_line < line). Used by dev-pr-review-publish to ship the OS-side review back to GitHub. Returns { id, html_url, state, submitted_at, comments: [{ id, path, line, html_url }] }.
